# Free Sauce

> Crowdsourced map of Australian pie shops that do not charge for tomato sauce.

## About

Free Sauce tracks which pie shops across Australia include free tomato sauce with a pie — and which ones charge. Add a shop, vote on sauce status, and help fellow Aussies find free sauce near them.

## Features

- Interactive map of verified and unverified pie shops across Australia
- Add a pie shop with Google Places autocomplete
- Vote on whether a shop offers free sauce (email confirmation required)
- Verified-only view toggle
- Per-shop pages with vote totals, location, and photo

## Routes

- `/` — the sauce map
- `/add` — add a new pie shop
- `/shop/{slug}` — shop detail + voting

## Related

- Site: https://thefreesauce.quest
- Sitemap: https://thefreesauce.quest/sitemap-index.xml
